sources.title: 緋色の欠片 ～おもいいろの記憶～ 攻略 (choro / 乙女ゲーム攻略ブログ)
sources.notes: Complete guide hub for the Switch/Vita 'おもいいろの記憶' rerelease, linking to individual character pages (hiiro-guide-mahiro, hiiro-guide-shinzi, hiiro-guide-yuichi, hiiro-guide-takuma, and a Suguru page at blog-entry-2187.html). Explicitly states the recommended order '鬼崎拓磨or鴉取真弘⇒狐邑祐一⇒犬戒慎司⇒大蛇卓ot狗谷遼' and 'attack restrictions: none' (攻略制限：ありません) for this rerelease. Primary source for route order and for the claim that the rerelease removes Ryou's lock.

sources.title: 緋色の欠片 〜 おもいいろの記憶 〜 本編攻略 (ruRiの気ままにオタ活, Hatena Blog)
sources.notes: Complete single-page walkthrough covering the common route split and per-character SAVE-point choice trees for all 6 guardians, with a full bad-end catalog (35 documented across all routes). States that the recommended order shown is the author's personal preference to minimize spoilers, and notes a shared save file between Suguru and Ryou ('共通SAVE（卓・遼）のデータがある場合はそこから進めてもOK'), used to corroborate the Suguru/Ryou route relationship. Primary source for common-route and SAVE-point structure.

sources.title: 緋色の欠片 攻略 (HalfAdder)
sources.notes: Appears to be a complete walkthrough covering chapters 1-8, final chapter, and subsequent seasonal-event chapters (秋祭り編/バレンタイン編/クリスマス編) for all characters, based on search-result snippets and site structure. Direct fetch failed repeatedly during this research session (connection refused to the host) — content was NOT directly verified and should be re-fetched and cross-checked before being used to write final guide steps.

sources.title: 『緋色の欠片』攻略 (乙女ゲームラバー)
sources.notes: Complete single consolidated page containing all six character routes' choice trees in one document (rather than separate linked pages). Confirms Takuma is commonly recommended as the first route and that Ryou 'cannot be played on the 1st or 2nd playthrough; only accessible starting from the 3rd playthrough' with specific conditions — used as the primary source for the original-version Ryou lock description.

sources.title: 緋色の欠片 攻略：狗谷遼
sources.notes: Partial guide, Ryou-route only. Used to corroborate the shared/locked nature of Ryou's route; contains the phrase '二ルート目以降出現！同時出現となります' (appears from the 2nd route onward, appearing simultaneously with other routes). Page had encoding issues when fetched, so exact unlock wording is lower-confidence than the other sources and is treated as supporting rather than authoritative for the exact playthrough-count threshold.

sources.title: 緋色の欠片 - Wikipedia
sources.notes: Reference only (not a walkthrough). Used to confirm the five/six guardian character names and readings, and the list of related series titles (Hiiro no Kakera 2/3/4, Switch remaster, fandisc).

sources.title: 大蛇 卓 [SUGURU OHMI] - TVアニメ『緋色の欠片』公式サイト
sources.notes: Reference only. Official anime site character page, used to resolve the correct reading/romanization of 大蛇卓 as 'Suguru Oomi/Ohmi' (surname Oomi, given name Suguru) after auto-generated summaries inconsistently rendered it as 'Orochi Taku' or 'Oomi Taku'.

sources.title: Hiiro no Kakera - VNDB entry v1629
sources.notes: Reference only. Confirms VNDB id v1629 corresponds to the original July 6, 2006 PC release of 緋色の欠片, and that all later ports (PSP 2008, DS 2008, PS3 'Aizouban ~Akane Iro no Tsuioku~' 2011, Vita 'Omoi Iro no Kioku' 2017, Switch 'Tamayori Hime Kitan ~Omoi Iro no Kioku~' 2024) are releases under this same VNDB entry rather than separate titles. This is why Japanese guides referencing the 'おもいいろの記憶' subtitle are valid sources for v1629.
